stemHtml:
Refer to figure. 
Given the following information and the extract from the fuel breakdown for a flight from VOGO to EGCC, with EDDM nominated as an en-route alternate, calculate the minimum block fuel required. 

Average fuel flow (airborne): 5758 kg/h 
Fuel flow on the ground: 1500 kg/h 
Holding fuel flow: As for the final reserve
